mapper.select: select d.* from favorite f join disk_item d on d.id = f.disk_item_id where f.user_id = #{userId} and d.is_deleted = 0 order by f.create_time desc limit #{offset}, #{pageSize}
select count(1) from favorite f join disk_item d on d.id = f.disk_item_id where f.user_id = #{userId} and d.is_deleted = 0
